commands.review_summary:
The branch exports the Codex app-server auth marker from core marker handling, includes it in core non-secret API key markers, and adds a regression test for disabled bundled plugin discovery.

PR surface: Source +3, Tests +10. Total +13 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The PR body gives a concrete before/after `secrets audit --check` path with `OPENCLAW_DISABLE_BUNDLED_PLUGINS=1`, and source inspection shows current main depends on plugin-discovered markers for the Codex marker.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed because the patch is narrow, proof-positive, and has no actionable review findings.

target.title: fix(secrets): treat Codex app-server marker as non-secret
target.body:
## Summary
- Treat the Codex app-server auth marker as a core non-secret marker.
- Keep the marker recognized when bundled plugin discovery is disabled.
- Add regression coverage for the disabled-bundled-plugins path.

## Verification
- `pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents-core.config.ts src/agents/model-auth-markers.test.ts` passed: 1 file, 8 tests.

## Real Behavior Proof

Added real behavior proof with an isolated throwaway OpenClaw state dir. No real user config, `.env`, auth profiles, logs, tokens, or private paths were used.

Fixture under test:

```json
{
  "providers": {
    "codex": {
      "apiKey": "codex-app-server"
    }
  }
}
```

`codex-app-server` is the fixed synthetic Codex app-server marker, not a secret.

Before, current `main`, same fixture, bundled plugin discovery disabled:

```console
$ OPENCLAW_DISABLE_BUNDLED_PLUGINS=1 OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=<throwaway-state> OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=<empty-config> node scripts/run-node.mjs secrets audit --check
Secrets audit: findings. plaintext=1, unresolved=0, shadowed=0, legacy=0.
- [PLAINTEXT_FOUND] $OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR/agents/main/agent/models.json:providers.codex.apiKey models.json provider apiKey is stored as plaintext.
```

Observed exit code: `1`.

After, this PR branch, same fixture, bundled plugin discovery disabled:

```console
$ OPENCLAW_DISABLE_BUNDLED_PLUGINS=1 OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=<throwaway-state> OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=<empty-config> node scripts/run-node.mjs secrets audit --check
Secrets audit: clean. plaintext=0, unresolved=0, shadowed=0, legacy=0.
```

Observed exit code: `0`.

Secondary regression proof:

```console
$ pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents-core.config.ts src/agents/model-auth-markers.test.ts
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  8 passed (8)
```
target.author: vortexopenclaw
